_comment: Synthetic BTC tx graph demonstrating COMMON-INPUT-OWNERSHIP clustering with sanctions inheritance. Transaction cospend1 spends a REAL OFAC SDN SUEX OTC address (12QtD5BFwRsdNsAZY76UVE1xyCGNTojH9h, CYBER2, listed 2021-09-21) TOGETHER with two other wallets in a single multi-input tx -- the common-input heuristic proves all three are one entity, so the whole cluster inherits the SUEX taint. Only the SUEX address is a real SDN entry; the rest are fictional placeholders.
